name: Discount Calculator
description: Industrial-grade discount analysis tool for evaluating pricing strategies, margin impact, and volume trade-offs. Aligns with ISO 9001 cost management and Lean Six Sigma value stream principles.

inputs.label: List Price (per unit)
inputs.businessContext: Standard selling price before any discount, as defined in ISO 9001 cost accounting procedures.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard selling price before any discount, as defined in ISO 9001 cost accounting procedures.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 9001 maliyet muhasebesi prosedürlerinde tanımlandığı gibi, herhangi bir indirimden önceki standart satış fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardverkaufspreis vor Rabatt, gemäß ISO 9001 Kostenrechnungsverfahren.

inputs.label: Discount Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Negotiated or promotional discount off list price, typical in Lean pricing strategies.

businessContext_i18n.en: Negotiated or promotional discount off list price, typical in Lean pricing strategies.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yalın fiyatlandırma stratejilerinde tipik olan, liste fiyatından müzakere edilen veya promosyonel indirim.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ausgehandelter oder werblicher Rabatt auf den Listenpreis, typisch für Lean-Preisstrategien.

inputs.label: Order Quantity
inputs.businessContext: Number of units in the transaction, used for volume-based discount analysis per WERC DC metrics.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of units in the transaction, used for volume-based discount analysis per WERC DC metrics.
businessContext_i18n.tr: WERC DC metriklerine göre hacim bazlı indirim analizi için kullanılan işlemdeki birim sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Einheiten in der Transaktion, verwendet für mengenbasierte Rabattanalyse gemäß WERC DC-Kennzahlen.

inputs.label: Variable Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct material, labor, and variable overhead per unit (ISO 14051 MFCA standard).

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct material, labor, and variable overhead per unit (ISO 14051 MFCA standard).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birim başına direkt malzeme, işçilik ve değişken genel gider (ISO 14051 MFCA standardı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Direkte Material-, Arbeits- und variable Gemeinkosten pro Einheit (ISO 14051 MFCA-Standard).

inputs.label: Fixed Cost Allocation (total)
inputs.businessContext: Allocated fixed costs for the order batch (e.g., setup, engineering, admin) per Lean cost deployment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Allocated fixed costs for the order batch (e.g., setup, engineering, admin) per Lean cost deployment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sipariş partisi için dağıtılan sabit maliyetler (örn. hazırlık, mühendislik, idari) Yalın maliyet dağıtımına göre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zugewiesene Fixkosten für den Auftragslos (z. B. Rüstkosten, Engineering, Verwaltung) gemäß Lean-Kostenzuordnung.

inputs.label: Discount Type
inputs.businessContext: Method of discount application: percentage off list or fixed dollar amount per unit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Method of discount application: percentage off list or fixed dollar amount per unit.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İndirim uygulama yöntemi: liste fiyatından yüzde indirim veya birim başına sabit dolar tutarı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Methode der Rabattanwendung: Prozentualer Rabatt auf den Listenpreis oder fester Dollarbetrag pro Einheit.

inputs.label: Apply Discount to All Units
inputs.businessContext: If true, discount applies to entire quantity; if false, only to incremental units (tiered pricing).

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, discount applies to entire quantity; if false, only to incremental units (tiered pricing).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğruysa, indirim tüm miktara uygulanır; yanlışsa, yalnızca artan birimlere (kademeli fiyatlandırma).
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn wahr, gilt der Rabatt für die gesamte Menge; wenn falsch, nur für zusätzliche Einheiten (gestaffelte Preisgestaltung).

rules.message: Discounted price is at or below variable cost. This may violate ISO 9001 profitability thresholds.
Order quantity is low; consider minimum order quantity policies per Lean lot sizing.
Fixed cost allocation exceeds 50% of total list revenue. Review cost allocation method (ABC).

thresholds.message: Net margin is negative. Immediate pricing review recommended per Six Sigma DMAIC.
Net margin below 10%. Consider cost reduction or price optimization (Lean value stream).
Discount exceeds 30%. Validate strategic intent and impact on brand value (ISO 20437).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
